message:
fix: remove auto-close of permanent issues from wisp reaper (gt-hln2)

The wisp reaper was autonomously closing permanent issues in the issues
table based on age heuristics (30-day stale_issue_age). This is a ZFC
violation: the reaper should only operate on ephemeral wisps, not make
autonomous decisions about permanent data.

Removed: autoCloseStaleIssuesInDB, autoCloseStaleIssuesSimple,
staleIssueAge config, defaultStaleIssueAge constant, and related tests.
The reaper now only touches the wisps table (reap + purge) and mail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
